economic_notes: Metlakatla Development Corporation and Metlakatla Stewardship Society appear as related entities in accounts receivable. Metlakatla Treaty also referenced.
notes: No long-term debt identified. Metlakatla Development Corporation ($1,190,564) and Metlakatla Stewardship Society ($1,142) appear in accounts receivable as related entities but are not consolidated. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($4,435,225) + FNHA ($786,882) + BC Gaming ($743,472) + Province of BC ($783,848) + FNESC ($63,518) = $6,812,945 plus Ottawa Trust Funds interest ($7,003) treated as quasi-government = $6,819,948; OSR includes marketable securities income and Other revenue. Strategic Initiatives expenditure is the largest program at $2,186,570. No remuneration schedule included in provided pages. Elder Investment Fund surplus of $3,843,029 is notable.
